engine.name: [pt] HivePlainScan
engine.tagline: [pt] Radiology reports explained in plain English

home.h1: [pt] Your radiology report, in plain English.
home.lede: [pt] Paste, upload, or photograph a finalized imaging report. Get a clear summary, a finding-by-finding breakdown, questions to bring to your doctor, and a downloadable PDF. No diagnosis. No jargon. Free, forever.

explain.questions_heading: [pt] Questions to bring to your doctor
explain.redflags_heading: [pt] Things to take to your doctor promptly
explain.ai_caption: [pt] AI-generated educational illustration based on report text.
explain.svg_caption: [pt] Schematic diagram based on report text.
explain.not_real_image: [pt] Not an actual medical image. Not to scale.

phi.preview_prefix: [pt] Heads up: the report text contains
phi.preview_suffix: [pt] We will remove anything matching these patterns before sending the report to the AI.

errors.generic: [pt] Something went wrong. Please check your report and try again.
errors.image_no_ai: [pt] Image-based explanations require the AI service. Please paste the report text instead.

disclaimer.default: [pt] This explanation is based on the radiology report you provided. It is for educational purposes only. It does not diagnose your condition, recommend treatment, or replace advice from your physician.
disclaimer.footer: [pt] This is not medical advice. Always consult a qualified clinician.
disclaimer.no_ads: [pt] No ads. No investors. No agenda.
disclaimer.free_forever: [pt] Free at the base tier, forever.
